calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-26-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Defendant/Judgment Debtor MARIA L. ANDRADE (Tel: 415-955-7325) present in pro per;
No other appearances made in this matter.

FURTHER HEARING RE: WESTLAKE SERVICES, LLC'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER DETERMINING THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

Matter argued and submitted.

The Court rules as follows: Defendant/Judgment Debtor Maria L. Andrade's claim of exemption is GRANTED. Ms. Andrade has met her burden in showing that her earnings are necessary to support herself and/or her family. The levying officer shall release any earnings held to the judgment debtor.

The Court signs a formal order and mail copies to the parties and the Sacramento County Sheriff's Office.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR No. 5041, Email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. (302/EPS)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jul-12-2021 Continued To Jul-26-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Vivian Lerche, Esq., (vlerche2@yahoo.com) Specially appearing on behalf of Plaintiff. via Zoom.
Maria L. Andrade (415-955-7325) Defendant in propria persona.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). Judgment Debtor stated she cannot commit to a payment and submitted documents as exhibits regarding her paycheck and payments.

Judgment debtor's exhibits are identified:

A - pay stub
B - payment to car insurance policy
C - Fastrak transportation cost
D - June 17th letter from Lorna Evans re: monthly rent
E - AT & T payment receipt dated June 10, 2021
F - Union Dues dated May 28, 2021
G - Car Insurance
H - Car payment
I - Additional pay stubs (April/May)

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF WESTLAKE SERVICES, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is continued to July 26, 2021 at 9:30am. Judgment debtor to forward documents submitted as exhibits to plaintiff's counsel at vlerche2@yahoo.com for review prior to next hearing date.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Rose Miller, CSR#5041, email: RMillerCSR@gmail.com. =(302/EPS)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Jun-28-2021 Continued To Jul-12-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES:
Atty. VIVIAN LERCHE, Esq. of Westlake Services LLC (Yel: 323-801-7140) as/for the Judgment Creditor (via Zoom Videoconference);
Judgment Debtor MARIA L. ANDRADE (Tel: 415-955-7325) in pro per.

PLAINTIFF WESTLAKE SERVICES, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

The Court's tentative ruling instructed the parties to appear.

Matter discussed.

The Court continues the matter so that the parties may attempt to discuss a possible settlement.

The matter is continued for further hearing to July 12, 2021 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Eric Throne, CSR No. 7855, Email: eric.throne.csr@gmail.com, Tel: 707-305-8964 (302/EPS)
